name: superpowers
description: 系统化规划、调试、测试、评审与交付流程技能集合

skills.name: brainstorming
skills.description: 在实现前澄清目标、约束和设计方案
skills.shortDescription: 在实现前澄清目标、约束和设计方案
skills.defaultPrompt: Use $brainstorming to explore intent, requirements, and design before implementation.

skills.name: dispatching-parallel-agents
skills.description: 把独立任务分派给多个代理并汇总结果
skills.shortDescription: 把独立任务分派给多个代理并汇总结果
skills.defaultPrompt: Use $dispatching-parallel-agents when independent tasks can be delegated in parallel.

skills.name: executing-plans
skills.description: 按已批准计划推进实现并保留检查点
skills.shortDescription: 按已批准计划推进实现并保留检查点
skills.defaultPrompt: Use $executing-plans to execute a written implementation plan.

skills.name: finishing-a-development-branch
skills.description: 在验证通过后整理合并、PR 或收尾选项
skills.shortDescription: 在验证通过后整理合并、PR 或收尾选项
skills.defaultPrompt: Use $finishing-a-development-branch when implementation is verified and ready to integrate.

skills.name: receiving-code-review
skills.description: 严谨核实评审意见并实现必要修改
skills.shortDescription: 严谨核实评审意见并实现必要修改
skills.defaultPrompt: Use $receiving-code-review when responding to code review feedback.

skills.name: requesting-code-review
skills.description: 在重要实现完成后组织代码评审
skills.shortDescription: 在重要实现完成后组织代码评审
skills.defaultPrompt: Use $requesting-code-review when implementation is complete and needs review.

skills.name: subagent-driven-development
skills.description: 用子代理并行推进实现、检查和质量评审
skills.shortDescription: 用子代理并行推进实现、检查和质量评审
skills.defaultPrompt: Use $subagent-driven-development to execute plans with independent subagent work.

skills.name: systematic-debugging
skills.description: 先定位根因，再以最小改动修复问题
skills.shortDescription: 先定位根因，再以最小改动修复问题
skills.defaultPrompt: Use $systematic-debugging when a bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior appears.

skills.name: test-driven-development
skills.description: 用先失败再实现的测试驱动功能和修复
skills.shortDescription: 用先失败再实现的测试驱动功能和修复
skills.defaultPrompt: Use $test-driven-development when implementing a feature or bug fix.

skills.name: using-git-worktrees
skills.description: 为功能工作创建隔离工作区
skills.shortDescription: 为功能工作创建隔离工作区
skills.defaultPrompt: Use $using-git-worktrees when starting feature work that needs isolation.

skills.name: using-superpowers
skills.description: 判断何时以及如何使用 Superpowers 技能
skills.shortDescription: 判断何时以及如何使用 Superpowers 技能
skills.defaultPrompt: Use $using-superpowers to establish how and when to use Superpowers skills.

skills.name: verification-before-completion
skills.description: 在声明完成前运行 fresh verification
skills.shortDescription: 在声明完成前运行 fresh verification
skills.defaultPrompt: Use $verification-before-completion before claiming work is complete or passing.

skills.name: writing-plans
skills.description: 把已批准方案拆成可执行实施计划
skills.shortDescription: 把已批准方案拆成可执行实施计划
skills.defaultPrompt: Use $writing-plans to create an implementation plan from approved requirements.

skills.name: writing-skills
skills.description: 创建、测试和发布高质量技能
skills.shortDescription: 创建、测试和发布高质量技能
skills.defaultPrompt: Use $writing-skills when creating or editing skills.
